disambiguation_rules.administrator: Refers to the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency, as the entity responsible for administering grants under the Federal Water Pollution Control Act amendments.

oddities.note: Document section provided contains only the short title heading (Sec. 1) with no substantive content. The summary precedes the text and describes legislative intent rather than extractable named entities from the actual statutory language.
